name: Sur La Table's French Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice onions thinly.
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan.
3. Add onions to the pan and sauté until soft and translucent.
4. Stir in sugar and cook over low heat until caramelized.
5. Mix in Dijon mustard, cognac, and flame briefly.
6. Gradually add beef stock until the soup begins to boil.
7. Stir constantly. Lower heat and cover the pan.
8. Simmer gently for one hour.
9. Ladle the soup into individual bowls.
10. Float a piece of toasted bread on top of each serving.
11. Cover generously with grated cheese.
12. Season with freshly ground pepper.
13. Broil until the cheese is melted.
